entity.name: Thomas Quick
entity.description: Creator and maintainer of NeuroScript, a neural architecture composition language that compiles to PyTorch. NeuroScript treats neurons as first-class composable units with compile-time shape validation, enabling declarative definition of neural networks with strong correctness guarantees.

projects.name: NeuroScript
projects.description: A neural architecture composition language that compiles to PyTorch. Features compile-time shape algebra, composable neuron abstractions, a package manager with cryptographic signing, and a standard library of reusable neural building blocks. Designed to make neural network development declarative, type-safe, and reproducible.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors for the NeuroScript organization

plans.name: Monthly recurring sponsorship of any amount
